actions.name: Sweet Veil
actions.description: Effect: The user is immune to the @Affliction[drowsy] and @Affliction[nightmares] Afflictions. Allied creatures in range have a 50% chance of being cured of @Affliction[drowsy] and @Affliction[nightmares] at the end of their Activations.
